title: Every country × status combination
prompt: Produce a reference grid of every possible combination of customer country and order status — including combinations that never actually occur. Use a CROSS JOIN of the distinct countries and distinct statuses. Columns: country, status. Order by country, status.

generic: FROM (SELECT DISTINCT country FROM customers) AS co
CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT status FROM orders) AS st

hints: A CROSS JOIN pairs every row of one set with every row of the other.
Get the distinct countries and distinct statuses as two subqueries, then CROSS JOIN them.
